title: Dark Blue Netherite
description: To quickly find netherite among netherrack
body:
# This is what it looks like:

![before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2ffc8936156870f7bde94aef0ccffb429627d91.png)

![after](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49da7ea0b61552ebba724a1be64a722045ba8979.png)

# ✨ Features:

Completely replaces the texture of **ancient debris**

Bright and contrasting **blue** color

Does not affect gameplay—**only visual** changes

**Compatible** with other resource packs

Suitable for **survival** and PvP

![resurs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d2b214b60e4acedd81ed9ad5c2442491d26242d.png)


📦 Type: **Resource Pack**
🎮 Minecraft Version:**_1.16-1.21.11_**


This _resource pack_ changes the appearance of ancient _netherite_ fragments, replacing the default texture with a stylish blue version. The new color makes the ore more **visible** in the depths of _the Nether_ and gives it a unique, technological look.
